programme.desc: Due to their similiar looks, Hitomi often loses out on her modeling opportunities to Jun. Despite this, Hitomi finds herself attracted to Jun, arising the suspicion that Hitomi may also be another Beast.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Fog
programme.desc: Experiencing her defeat at the hands of Airial, Jun ends up at a local hospital while a deep fog encircles the city. Dismayed by Jun's defeat, Lan commands her to battle the beast once more.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Enemy
programme.desc: Jun is introduced to Dr. Jason Bates who professes his interest in her, both as a woman and as Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Eyes
programme.desc: Jun can't shake off the feeling that she's being watched. All the while, Lan and HA team discover that curious string of murders have been occuring where the victims' eyes have been taken.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Flames
programme.desc: Four year old Remi is miraculously rescued from a fire. Suspecting her to be another Beast, Lan orders for the girl to be further evaluated.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Box
programme.desc: When four bodies are found inside an elevator of a department store in midst of a Christmas season, Jun is ordered by Lan to investigate the matter on a Christmas eve.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Faces
programme.desc: Jun wakes from a nightmare in which a Beast hunts one another. Puzzled by the cryptic dream Jun is haunted by the nightmare even while she's awake.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Rope
programme.desc: A highschool girl is lured to a famous illustrator, Otoya's residence. She is hosted by his sister-in-law who captures the teen and offers her to Otoya who had turned in to a Beast.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Home
programme.desc: Suspecting that Jun is connected to the murder of his wife and their only daughter, Sakazawa contacts her by claiming that he has kidnapped Kazumi.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Crows
programme.desc: As Kazumi debates on whether to pursue her career in modeling or to attend college, a series of murders occur in which victims are impaled in high places.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Voice
programme.desc: Mysterious series of murders show no signs of stopping. The guilt of putting Kazumi's life in danger further weighs down Jun, leading the two to revisit Kazumi's former home where her parents were murdered.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Hunger
programme.desc: Fearing that she is slowly losing control of herself, Jun soon decides that she can no longer continue her career as a fashion model.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Body
programme.desc: Jun is now kept in a HA facility. As they conduct various examinations she wonders off to a sector of the lab where she finds Dr. Bates who has been captured by Lan.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Shakles
programme.desc: The release of Sakazawa's notes about the Beast Phenomenon stokes further panic to the city.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Corpses
programme.desc: Beasts that had been defeated by Jun reappear in front of her to attack her once again.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Signs
programme.desc: A national vaccination has been obligated to the citizens in an attempt to prevent Beast Phenomenon from further spreading.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Wish
programme.desc: Shocked by Kazumi's transformation and nearly defeated by the Crusaders, Jun's consciousness begins to fade as she is rescued by Kazumi who has completed her evolution.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Life
programme.desc: Unable to recover from the sorrows of losing Kazumi, Jun quietly stares at the ocean. In her absence, the Beasts led by Crusaders attack the HA base to recover their captured allies.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Heart
programme.desc: It has been six months, Jun exiled herself away from the city and had been living quietly with an elderly couple and their granddaughter.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: God
programme.desc: On the surface, peace seems to have been restored in Tokyo. Beasts still remain captured and are exterminated on a daily basis.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Man
programme.desc: Defeat of Jun at the hands of Lan is witnessed throughout the world. Government leaders hail Lan's victory and proclaims her as child of God who will bring a thousand years of peace.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Beast
programme.desc: Jun Fudo is taken by a mysterious woman and finds herself being attacked by a werewolf-like creature. As she tries to save herself, she transforms into Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Blood
programme.desc: Jun tries to regain some sense of normalcy as she resumes her modeling career but finds herself yet again struggling to come to terms with her true identity.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Wings
programme.desc: A mysterious boy appears in front of Jun one night, proclaiming that he'll kill Jun's lover then disappears in to the darkness. Fearing that Kazumi is in danger, Jun hurries to Kazumi's home.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Embryo
programme.desc: As Jun breaksdown and confess her struggles of being the Devil Lady, Lan Asuka appears once again to take Jun to a military compound.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Shark
programme.desc: Lan informs Jun that Aoi Kurosaki, Jun's old classmate, is possessor of Devil Beast Syndrome and may potentially be Jun's new ally.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran cuerpos en lugares públicos alrededor de Boston, el UAC investiga si un taxi o servicio de transporte que las víctimas utilizaron antes de su muerte podría guiar hasta el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un espantoso acontecimiento en la fiesta de revelación de sexo de un suboficial de la Marina lleva al NCIS al caso de una profesora desaparecida que se popularizó en un podcast de crímenes reales.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga el aparente suicidio de un oficial retirado de la Marina que estaba en el grupo de duelo de Palmer y Knight. Torres recibe una llamada de la agente especial del NCIS Jane Tennant para que vaya a Hawai a investigar un testigo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un infame traficante de armas, Reymundo Díaz, sale de la cárcel y los cadáveres empiezan a acumularse, Torres se ve obligado a enfrentarse a las repercusiones de sus acciones durante una operación encubierta en la que trabajó hace años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga una red de adolescentes astutos cuando se produce una serie de robos en la Base de Marines de Quantico. Mientras trabaja en el caso, el agente especial McGee establece un vínculo con una de las adolescentes, Teagan Fields.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC implementa una estrategia elaborada para tratar de acabar con el anillo de sicarios “Los doce sucios”, con Reid jugando un papel central.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Gary The Honey Man Grose loves two things: honey making and educating people about honey making. Gary depends on his truck to haul everything from Honey jars to honeybees so they turn Gary's old flatbed Hino into the ultimate honey-dripping hive.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matt Kolb is a proud grandfather and 32 year veteran of the road. Known as a kid at heart, Matt's always looking for a good time. But the bad economy and poor shape of his truck have this former wild child feeling down.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff White was a proud truck driver with 17 years of experience under his belt. But his career came to a stop when his daughter Amanda suffered severe injuries in a car accident.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Todd Gauthier put his love of truck driving to the side for his son, Brian. Trucking money was not enough to put Brian through college, so Todd sacrificed his love of the road for a better paying job.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mike Richardson is an American hero. He served our country during the Vietnam War and was awarded two purple hearts. After the war, Mike got into trucking.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: A few years ago, Darrell gave it up, became an ordained minister and founded the Best Wedding Chapel. The crown jewel of his chapel is his 1942 American La France Fire Engine.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: During his cancer treatments, Chris had to sell his Kenworth to pay the never-ending medical bills. By an amazing stroke of luck, he tracked down his old Kenworth and was able to buy it back.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: The staff is skeptical of Robbie's new incentive program, Nicole plots revenge on JJ after he flakes on work, and a drunk bridesmaid wanders away from the party.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: When a couple heads to Nashville for a joint bachelor-bachelorette party, the staff is put in charge of choosing a best man and juggling both the bride and groom's needs.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: The staff pulls out all the stops for a patriotic party, Robbie confides in JJ that the company is in debt, and Liz and Rosa ignite a prank war.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Lack of communication leads to a waste of time and money and Robbie breaks out the Fun Bus when a limo scheduling mishap derails plans for a party of Broadway performers.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: The crew scrambles to find a last-minute party after a cancellation, leading to a weekend of juice cleanses, Botox, an angry policeman and a surprising reveal from Robbie.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: California yogis arrive for an adventure-filled weekend, a mistake by Rosa pushes Rachal over the edge, and the Bach Weekend crew tries to lift Rachal's spirits.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Birthday diva Liz forces the office to go all out, Rachal makes a painful decision, and Robbie pursues a new investor as the company plans a multiparty ultimate weekend.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Liz fears for her job after she overhears Robbie talking to an investor, and the crew plans a competitive bachelor party for a former magician and his groomsmen.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Robbie knows something is going on as Liz secretly searches for a new job, the team hosts a bachelorette party from California, and Nicole has a secret admirer.

programme.title: Contra las cuerdas
programme.desc: Contra las cuerdas presenta a Meg Ryan como Kallen. Una osada y estridente entrenadora de boxeo decidida a cambiar Luther Shaw “Lethal” (Omar Epps) de ser un hombre punk de la calle a convertirse en el ganador mundial del boxeo.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: Un perdedor sin suerte

programme.desc: En esta comedia, Kirk, un tipo común, no puede creer su suerte cuando la exitosa y preciosa Molly se enamora de él. Sus amigos listos, su familia loca y hasta su insoportable exnovia están tan conmocionados como él.

programme.title: Serendipity ES
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: El sustituto (1996)

programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposa, Roberto se muda a la Ciudad de México con su hija, Alejandra. Ella se vuelve objeto de acoso cuando surge un video en el cual Alejandra tiene relaciones con un compañero.

programme.title: Camino a Marte
programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro

programme.title: Especies III

programme.title: Mega Piranha (LAS)
programme.desc: Una cepa mutante de pirañas feroces gigantes escapan del Amazonas y se dirigen a Florida.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Testigo
programme.desc: La viuda y madre de tres hijos, Annie Wilson, se gana la vida adivinando el futuro de los demás... a pesar de que el suyo se ha tornado más confuso de lo que ella misma puede ver.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: El último exorcismo: Parte II
programme.desc: Nell está de nuevo en la seguridad de la civilización y es enviada a vivir en una casa de acogida, donde se la anima a dejar atrás su pasado e iniciar una nueva vida.

programme.title: Extrañas apariciones
programme.desc: Después de que una familia se ve obligada a mudarse por la salud de su hijo, comienzan a experimentar un comportamiento sobrenatural en su nuevo hogar, que resulta ser una antigua funeraria.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: Instinto fatal
programme.desc: Una seductora mujer empuñando un picahielo se lanza, con amor y risa, a una divertida parodia de Carl Reiner, leyenda de la comedia y director de 'The Jerk'. Coprotagonizan Armand Assante, Sherilyn Fenn, Kate Nelligan y Sean Young.

programme.title: ¡Super secreto!
programme.desc: La estrella de rock estadounidense Nick Rivers se enfrenta al temido Alto Mando de Alemania Oriental. En una carrera contra el tiempo, Nick ayuda a Hillary a buscar a su padre.

programme.title: Salto de fé
programme.desc: Steve Martin interpreta al reverendo Jonas Nightengale, un hombre tramposo que viaja de ciudad en ciudad convenciendo a personas descarriadas y viviendo de sus donativos.

programme.title: La lista de al carajo
programme.desc: Luego de que su broma se sale de control, un estudiante comparte una lista con algunas de las cosas que desearía haber hecho distinto... y quizás aún pueda.

programme.title: Torrente 5
programme.desc: El policía corrupto sale de la cárcel en el 2018 para encontrar una España diferente a la que conocía.

programme.title: ¡Super secreto!
programme.desc: La estrella de rock estadounidense Nick Rivers se enfrenta al temido Alto Mando de Alemania Oriental. En una carrera contra el tiempo, Nick ayuda a Hillary a buscar a su padre.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The Legend Of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The sole surviving Texas Ranger of an ambush arranged by the outlaw leader Butch Cavandish returns to fight back as a great masked western hero - The Lone Ranger.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: Frankie And Johnny
programme.desc: Join Elvis Presley and Donna Douglas for a riverboat ride of rollicking musical entertainment in this charming and sassy comic hit about a gambler and his lady love.

programme.title: Yours, Mine, and Ours
programme.desc: When widowed nurse Helen North (Lucille Ball) meets widower Frank Beardsley (Henry Fonda), a population explosion takes place as her eight kids blend (or don't) with his ten in this chaotic, classic comedy! Van Johnson and Tom Bosley co-star.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: Ernest Borgnine won a Best Actor Oscar for his role as a Bronx butcher who gives up on love, until he meets an equally lonely school teacher in this charming story that garnered a total of four Oscars including Best Picture.

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient
programme.desc: Peter Sellers stars as a hilariously seedy concert pianist who is nearly driven mad after he becomes the obsession of two crush-crazed schoolgirls in this poignant, funny look at innocence lost. Angela Lansbury and Paula Prentiss also star.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck is upset after her wedding plans hit a snag, and a well-meaning offer from Maude makes a bad situation unbearable. Luckily, Carol's sensitivity gives Mrs. Naugatuck a shoulder to cry on.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Reverend Jim comes to the rescue when Alex is consumed by gambling fever after a lucky night in Atlantic City.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Simka learns that Latka has been unfaithful, she is bound by tradition to do the same thing with one of Latka's fellow cabbies.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After Latka has an affair with a female cabbie, Simka must do the same with one of his co-workers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jeff ends up in serious trouble after he confesses to stealing from the garage to protect the real villain.

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una Bolsa de Evidencia
programme.desc: Se investiga el asesinato de Jessica Knott, de 9 años. Los investigadores usan una bolsa de basura para conectar al sospechoso James Edward Crow, Jr. con el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Destinado a la cárcel
programme.desc: Una mujer es encontrada muerta en un barranco, pero las fuertes tormentas habían arrastrado pruebas cruciales de la escena del crimen. En dos ocasiones, el rastro se estancó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La hija de Paul Gruber sospechaba que algo malo estaba ocurriendo cuando recibió unas tarjetas de regalo enviadas de parte de su padre, pero escritas con la letra de una persona extraña.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mejora digital del video de la cámara de seguridad muestra que lo que parece ser un encuentro casual es en realidad un secuestro forzado, que conduce al asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Impresiones fuertes
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de la Fuerza Aérea fue encontrada muerta en su cama con una bolsa plástica de lavandería cerca de su rostro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un guardia de seguridad desapareció de su puesto sin dejar rastro. Sus restos fueron encontrados un año después en un campamento lejano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Reencuentro
programme.desc: Durante años, una mujer sufrió lo que parecían ser los efectos secundarios desagradables del litio, un medicamento recetado para tratar el trastorno bipolar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante seis años, un asesino en serie merodeó por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una hermosa joven cayó a su muerte desde un acantilado con vistas al océano. Inicialmente, los investigadores pensaron que se trataba de un trágico accidente.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring a dinosaur graveyard in Patagonia to gain a better understanding of dinosaur evolution, particularly the Middle Jurassic period when they became gigantic.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T-rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8 metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head to head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: The Mystery of Rome's X Tomb
programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott investigates the secrets of a tomb containing over 2,000 bodies in one of the catacombs of Rome.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is eager to make peace between the Sea Devils and the humans but has discovered that the Master is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: Jo attempts to rescue the Doctor who is being held prisoner by the Master and Trenchard. The Master plans to summon the Sea Devils from beneath the waves.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to persuade Captain Hart of the danger that the Master represents. Eager to make contact with the Sea Devils, the Doctor journey's to the sea bed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Sea Devils and taken to their undersea base. There, he tries to make peace with the creatures, but his efforts are thwarted by the Navy.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Sea Devils come to the surface and attack the Naval base. The Doctor is forced to create a machine that will awaken the creatures across the entire world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor is sent to a skybase orbiting the planet of Solos in the 30th century, where he must deliver a sealed message pod. Meanwhile, on the planet below, something is transforming the human population into hideous mutants.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: Ky flees to the planet's poisonous surface taking Jo with him while the Marshal, holding the Doctor captive, demands that he opens the message pod.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor searches for Jo in the caves of Solos. In the shadows the mutants prepare to attack.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sondergaard make an amazing discovery in the caves of Solos while Jo falls into the Marshal's trap.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Marshal's plans for Solos go disastrously wrong. Can the Doctor save the doomed planet in time to save Jo's life?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Marshal is on trial, with the Doctor as chief witness. But Jo and the Doctor's friends are the Marshal's prisoners. Will the Doctor dare to reveal the truth about the Marshal's crimes?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Masquerading as research scientist, Professor Thascales, the Master is using a device called TOMTIT to summon an ancient and powerful creature from beyond time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: The Doctor tracks the Master down to the Newton Institute. There, after a disastrous attempt to summon Kronos, the Master prepares to use TOMTIT once again.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Krasis, High Priest of Atlantis has been summoned by the Master to help him find the crystal of Kronos. The Master uses TOMTIT to summon threats from the past to attack UNIT.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: As UNIT approaches, the Master leaves for Atlantis in his TARDIS. However, the Doctor is not far behind and in the time vortex, the two Time Lords confront each other.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Arriving in Atlantis, the Master seduces the beautiful Queen Galleia so that he might possess the crystal of Kronos. But it is protected by a guardian who is half man, half beast.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: With the crystal of Kronos in his possession, the Master prepares to release the Chronovore. The Doctor is powerless to stop his nemesis as the end of Atlantis approaches.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: Attacked by an antimatter creature the Doctor sends an SOS to the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo pass through the black hole to the desolate world of antimatter.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctors are trapped in the universe of antimatter where they confront Omega.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: Omega intends to escape his antimatter world but needs the Doctors to take his place.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is free to roam space and time again, but having planned to visit Metebelis Three, the Doctor and Jo actually find themselves stowaways aboard a ship in the 1920s, heading for Bombay.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo realise that they are actually trapped in a loop on a miniaturised version of Earth in which the other ship passengers endlessly repeat their actions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: Having escaped from the ship, the Doctor and Jo find themselves stuck inside the workings of a giant machine. Can they find their way out?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is reunited with the TARDIS and now full size, but Jo is still trapped within the machine. When the Doctor meets the operators of the Scope he learms that Jo is in grave danger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo land on a spaceship in the far future as it is attacked by Ogrons, which the human crew see as Draconians. The Doctor and Jo are taken to Earth as spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: Neither the humans nor the Draconians are willing to believe the Doctor and Jo's story that someone is deliberately attempting to provoke a war between Earth and Draconia.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two German shepherds who get along fine at home, but are at each other's throats when at daycare; a miniature schnauzer that barks when her owner's grandchildren visit.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A great Dane bites her owner; a bearded collie with dog aggression; a mouthy French mastiff.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner is aggressive towards anyone who turns on one of the motorized bikes used to deliver the mail; an aggressive shar-pei; an Australian red cattle dog who barks incessantly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Forests and jungles are home to most of the Earth's wildlife and biodiversity. Their conservation and protection are crucial to many species and the only guarantee for future generations to enjoy this precious treasure.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Travelling an incredible, 3500 miles through rivers and streams, salmon are Alaska's hardiest resident. But there is one grizzly hazard they face right at the end of their journey. It's the brown bears.

programme.title: Riding The Ocean Dragon
programme.desc: Join us on a one-of-a-kind journey to a place that's more extreme, hostile, and unexplored than outer space. A place with more resources to gain and more undiscovered life to protect than anywhere in our universe.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live. In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: In this episode, Emily seems to have issues with the nine little monsters who are fighting with each other and destroying their toys. Mercedes has given birth to 14 puppies! Will they all make it with the help of Lesta and Jessica?

programme.title: Wildest Islands

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: The lions are on the hunt for giraffe. Meanwhile, researcher Rae accompanies the lions as they encounter nervy hartebeest. The game capture unit are tasked with supplying more zebra for the Ngama release site.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: During a rabies vaccination campaign Niven struggles to vaccinate a nervous dog. Will he see the task through or will his impatient nature let him down? An unvaccinated dog is a danger to the community.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2000 Mozambique Flood. Heavy rain through February and March 2000 led to massive flooding in Mozambique.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom Hunt goes in search of a unique human, Eskil Ronningsbakken capable of balancing on the edge of the 100 metre vertical drop of the Puento Nuevo Bridge.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In many human cultures, elders play a vital role in the well-being of communities and are responsible for passing down knowledge and culture.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: The hottest summer in Europe since 1540, this extreme heat caused devastation across Europe.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers

programme.desc: Mae preaches beautifully at A Day With Lady Mae as the Bishop fears he may lose Calvary; Grace gets a paternity test with Aaron and works with Jacob to clear their family name.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants hold onto monkey bars, suspended under a helicopter. In a Plexiglas coffin and covered with leeches. Contestants search for rubber boots at the bottom of a tank of cut up fish parts. Contestants must run their motorcycles off of a cliff.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will each be suspended from their own crane. Player is placed inside a sealed Plexiglas coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant seated in the helicopter will "go" they crawl out and under the helicopter. Players transfer cow hooves out of a tank of Cod Liver Oil and into a tank of Maggots. Contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a city bus. On a table, there are dishes of roaches. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside. Contestants must make the way across a maze of beams.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth from the boats to get as many flags. Contestant is put into a vat used for stomping on grapes to make wine. Contestant must walk the length of the truck removing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform. One at a time, contestants pick gifts from under a Christmas tree. Contestants must swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot Plexiglas grid that is lit on fire.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.

programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
